title: Automation for moving/duplicating an item without subitems to different boards
excerpt: fully automatically, how can I move/duplicate an item without the subitems to a different board? Essentially only wanting the Item Name and any data like dates not in the subitem. What about moving to different groups?

posts.author: Devin.T (Devin Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: fully automatically, how can I move/duplicate an item without the subitems to a different board? Essentially only wanting the Item Name and any data like dates not in the subitem. What about moving to different groups?

posts.author: VAC (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Devin,
Fully automatically, how can I move/duplicate an item without the subitems to a different board?
You can create automation. There are different ways to achieve this. For instance, say you want to move item when a status change or item is created in board1 to board2. You can use Automation

You can select the board you want and also from the item, you can only select the columns you want in the board2.

You can do the same to group but here you will all column information moved.

posts.author: Devin.T (Devin Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi V, thanks for the response. However, this method still moves/duplicates the subitems along with the items. I’d like to move/duplicate items without the subitems attached. Is this even a possibility?
